critic_notes: CON.10 Webanwendungen: 4 questions on CON.10.A8/A9/A14/A3. Quote 001 (`Die Entwickelnden MÜSSEN ... Session-IDs, MÜSSEN serverseitig validiert`) and quote 003 (HTTP-Header list with `Content-Security-Policy`) both render in source with `-\n` compound-hyphen artifacts — only match under aggressive normalization. This is a PDF extraction ambiguity, not fabricated content. Correct answers supported; distractors (clientside-only validation, dynamic SQL strings, wrong-header names) unambiguously wrong.

issues.detail: Fragment `Die Entwickelnden MÜSSEN sämtliche an eine Webanwendung übergebenen Daten als potenziell g...` matches source only under aggressive normalization (ignoring hyphens). PDF extracts compound words like `Content-Security-Policy` as `Content-Security-\nPolicy`; hyphen-newline is ambiguous between word-break and compound-hyphen.

Fragment `Es SOLLTEN mindestens die folgenden HTTP-Header verwendet werden: Content-Security-Policy,...` contains line-break hyphen artifact from PDF extraction; matches under dehyphenation within section range.
